title: Noachis Terra
summary:
Noachis Terra (; lit. "Land of Noah") is an extensive southern landmass (terra) of the planet Mars.  It lies west of the giant Hellas impact basin, roughly between the latitudes −20° and −80° and longitudes 30° west and 30° east, centered on 45°S 350°E.  It is in the Noachis quadrangle.
The term "Noachian epoch" is derived from this region.
text:
